mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_key, m.menu_name, m.path, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.is_enabled FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id JOIN role_menus rm ON rm.role_id = r.id AND rm.can_access = 1 JOIN menus m ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND m.is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(m.parent_id, m.id), m.sort_order, m.id

SELECT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_key, m.menu_name, m.path, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.is_enabled FROM menus m WHERE m.is_enabled = 1 AND m.id IN
#{id}
